title: View x Comments

posts.author: Han (Kuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Senior Monday.com Experts

Friday is not far away and may you have great coming weekends.

I understand the user type has very limited function access on Monday.com; however, is there any tricky way to let the “View” leave the comments on each item instead of changing their type to Member? Even any outsourced Free app-s will be mega helpful.

Best regards
Han
